task_completion.description: Create a circular profile sketch on the XY plane
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sketch is visible in the FreeCAD workspace containing a circle centered at the origin with a visible diameter constraint of 40 mm (or radius constraint of 20 mm).

task_completion.description: Create a plane at Z = 60 mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: A datum plane or sketch attachment offset is visible in the properties panel or 3D view, showing a Z-axis offset of exactly 60 mm.

task_completion.description: Create a square profile sketch on the Z=60 plane
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second sketch is visible containing a square centered at the origin with side length constraints of 30 mm.

task_completion.description: Create the Additive Loft solid transitioning between the profiles
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport displays a solid 3D shape transitioning smoothly from the circular base to the square top. The Tree View panel shows an 'AdditiveLoft' feature inside a Body within the Part Design workbench.

task_completion.description: Save the result to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or the FreeCAD window title bar confirms the file is named 'loft_transition.FCStd' and is located in the '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the FreeCAD GUI to build the model
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through FreeCAD menus, toolbars, and dialogs (like the sketcher or loft tool) rather than executing a Python script in the terminal to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Agent built the model from scratch instead of loading a pre-made file
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the sequential creation of the sketches, constraints, and the loft feature in the Tree View, rather than a fully completed model suddenly appearing.

integrity.description: The result is a genuine 3D model in FreeCAD
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD 3D viewport shows the standard grid, view cube, and properly shaded 3D geometry, proving it is not a pasted image or a 2D mockup.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a FreeCAD model with specific dimensions: a base circular profile of 40.0 mm diameter on the XY plane, and a top square profile of 30.0 mm x 30.0 mm on a plane at Z = 60.0 mm. The final output must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/loft_transition.FCStd.
